reforms.description: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities aims to improve the competitive environment by reducing barriers to entry and enhancing public-private collaboration in innovation. Additionally, the programme d’investissements d’avenir is designed to support this collaboration and entrepreneurship, emphasizing thematic objectives and evaluation to align research activities with national priorities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance collaboration and reduce barriers, which can lead to increased innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant structural change in the approach to innovation policy in France.
reforms.source_quote: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities improved the competitive environment in a number of areas.
